inputs.label: Full Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which you can receive full Social Security retirement benefits.

label_i18n.fr: Âge de la retraite à taux plein

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which you can receive full Social Security retirement benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam Sosyal Güvenlik emeklilik yardımlarını almaya başlayabileceğiniz yaş.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Alter, in dem Sie volle Sozialversicherungsrentenleistungen erhalten können.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel vous pouvez percevoir l'intégralité de vos prestations de retraite de la Sécurité sociale.

inputs.label: Planned Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: The age at which you plan to start claiming benefits.

label_i18n.fr: Âge prévu de départ à la retraite

businessContext_i18n.en: The age at which you plan to start claiming benefits.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Alter, in dem Sie planen, Leistungen zu beziehen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge auquel vous prévoyez de commencer à demander vos prestations.

inputs.label: Primary Insurance Amount (PIA)
inputs.businessContext: Your monthly benefit at full retirement age.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your monthly benefit at full retirement age.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihre monatliche Leistung bei Erreichen des Regelrentenalters.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre prestation mensuelle à l'âge de la retraite à taux plein.

inputs.label: Annual Delay Credit Rate
inputs.businessContext: The percentage increase in benefits for each year of delay past full retirement age.

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage increase in benefits for each year of delay past full retirement age.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam emeklilik yaşını geçtikten sonraki her yıl için faydalardaki yüzde artış.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der prozentuale Anstieg der Leistungen für jedes Jahr des Aufschubs über das Regelrentenalter hinaus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'augmentation des prestations pour chaque année de report après l'âge de la retraite à taux plein.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
